featureName: Blog Section — Landing + Index + Article Pages
description: Section blog complete : apercu 3 derniers articles sur landing page, page /blog avec liste filtrable, page /blog/[slug] avec rendu markdown stylise. Articles lus directement depuis blog/articles/*.md avec frontmatter YAML.

userStories.title: Blog utility library (gray-matter + fs article parser)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a server-side utility that reads .md files from blog/articles/, parses YAML frontmatter with gray-matter, and exposes functions: getAllArticles(), getArticleBySlug(), getLatestArticles(n), getCategories(), getTags()
acceptanceCriteria: lib/blog.ts exports getAllArticles() returning sorted articles (newest first)
lib/blog.ts exports getArticleBySlug(slug) returning single article with parsed content
lib/blog.ts exports getLatestArticles(n) for landing page preview
Each article object contains: slug, title, date, author, category, tags, description, reading_time, content (raw markdown)
userStories.notes: Created lib/blog.ts with 7 exports: getAllArticles, getArticleBySlug, getLatestArticles, getAllCategories, getAllTags, getAllSlugs + types ArticleMeta/Article. gray-matter + react-markdown installed.

userStories.title: Blog article page (/blog/[slug]) with styled markdown rendering
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to read a full blog article on a dedicated page with beautiful markdown rendering (tables, headings, lists, blockquotes) matching the SEIDO dark theme design system
acceptanceCriteria: Page renders full article with styled markdown (headings, tables, lists, blockquotes, links)
Page has SEO metadata from frontmatter (title, description, OG tags)
Page has breadcrumb navigation (Accueil > Blog > Article title)
Page uses SEIDO dark theme with glassmorphism consistent with legal pages
userStories.notes: Created app/blog/layout.tsx (dark theme + gradients), app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx (Server Component with generateStaticParams, generateMetadata, JSON-LD Article schema, breadcrumb, tags as Badge), components/blog/blog-markdown.tsx (client component with react-markdown + remark-gfm + rehype-slug + rehype-autolink-headings, 15 custom styled components for dark theme).

userStories.title: Blog index page (/blog) with article cards + filters
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to browse all blog articles on /blog with category/tag filters and article cards showing title, description, date, reading time, tags
acceptanceCriteria: Displays all articles as styled cards (title, description, date, reading_time, category, tags)
Responsive grid: 1 col mobile, 2 cols tablet, 3 cols desktop
Empty state if no articles match filter
userStories.notes: Created 3 files: app/blog/page.tsx (Server Component, SEO metadata, Suspense skeleton), components/blog/blog-article-card.tsx (card with category badge, title, description, meta, tags preview), components/blog/blog-list-client.tsx (client component with search, category filter, tag filter, empty state, responsive grid).

userStories.title: Landing page blog section (3 latest articles preview)
userStories.description: As a visitor on the landing page, I want to see a preview of the 3 latest blog articles so that I discover valuable content and am encouraged to visit the blog
acceptanceCriteria: New section added to landing-page.tsx between FAQ and CTA sections
Section displays 3 latest article cards (title, description, date, reading_time, category)
Section has H2 with keyword (e.g. 'Actualites gestion immobiliere Belgique')
CTA button 'Voir tous les articles' linking to /blog
Consistent dark theme styling with rest of landing page
userStories.notes: Server-to-client data pattern: getLatestArticles(3) called in app/page.tsx (Server Component), passed as prop to LandingPage (Client Component). Blog section inserted between FAQ and CTA with FadeIn animations, BlogArticleCard reuse, responsive grid (1→3 cols), and 'Voir tous les articles' CTA button.

userStories.title: Navbar blog link + blog layout shared header/footer
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want a 'Blog' link in the landing page navbar and a consistent header/footer on blog pages so I can navigate easily
acceptanceCriteria: Blog link added to landing-header.tsx desktop nav (between FAQ and auth buttons)
Blog link added to mobile nav menu
Blog pages (index + article) share consistent header with landing-header showBlogNav or similar
Blog pages have footer consistent with landing page
userStories.notes: Added Blog link to landing-header desktop nav after FAQ. Created showBlogNav prop for blog pages with Accueil + Tous les articles links (active state on /blog). Moved LandingHeader into blog layout.tsx (shared across all blog pages). Moved footer to layout.tsx too — removed duplicate headers/footers from page.tsx and [slug]/page.tsx. Note: no mobile hamburger menu exists in the current design — all nav items use hidden md:flex pattern.

userStories.title: Blog SEO: sitemap entries + blog index in robots.ts
userStories.description: As an SEO strategist, I want all blog article URLs in sitemap.ts and /blog allowed in robots.ts so that search engines discover and index blog content
acceptanceCriteria: app/sitemap.ts updated to include /blog and all /blog/[slug] URLs dynamically
sitemap entries use article date as lastModified
userStories.notes: Updated app/sitemap.ts: added /blog (priority 0.8, weekly) and dynamic /blog/[slug] entries from getAllArticles() (priority 0.7, monthly, lastModified from article date). robots.ts already allows /blog via allow: '/' — no changes needed.
